title: cacalia mortonii
intro: Cacalia mortonii, also known as Western American Baccharis, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a popular choice for treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Cacalia mortonii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, as well as having antimicrobial properties that can help combat infections. Herbal preparations of Cacalia mortonii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
